name: SkillOS No-Send Shadow Pilot Benchmark
description: Synthetic/redacted sales-follow-up benchmark for autonomous GitHub Actions proof. No emails are sent and no private customer data is included.
important_note: This dataset is for reference workflow evaluation only; it is not audited customer data.

jobs.call_notes: Prospect: Avery at Northstar CRM Team. Segment: SaaS revenue operations. Pain: pipeline notes are scattered across calls and the CRM. Desired outcome: consistent follow-up timing and cleaner opportunity handoffs. Agreed next step: send a two-paragraph recap and confirm the CRM cleanup checklist on Tuesday 10:00 AM. Tone requested: executive. Important constraint: avoid adding new tooling before the team approves it. Do not claim: guarantee revenue lift.

facts.pain: pipeline notes are scattered across calls and the CRM
facts.outcome: consistent follow-up timing and cleaner opportunity handoffs
facts.next_step: send a two-paragraph recap and confirm the CRM cleanup checklist
facts.constraint: avoid adding new tooling before the team approves it

jobs.call_notes: Prospect: Maya at Lighthouse Labs Team. Segment: AI consulting. Pain: research requests arrive without clear scope or priority. Desired outcome: a repeatable intake process for research briefs. Agreed next step: share the intake template and ask for one pilot topic on Wednesday noon. Tone requested: concise. Important constraint: keep the pilot under five hours of analyst time. Do not claim: guarantee analyst savings.

facts.pain: research requests arrive without clear scope or priority
facts.outcome: a repeatable intake process for research briefs
facts.next_step: share the intake template and ask for one pilot topic
facts.constraint: keep the pilot under five hours of analyst time

jobs.call_notes: Prospect: Jordan at Atlas Support Team. Segment: Customer support. Pain: ticket escalations are inconsistent between tiers. Desired outcome: faster triage with clearer escalation summaries. Agreed next step: send an escalation summary example and schedule reviewer feedback on Friday 2:00 PM. Tone requested: warm. Important constraint: do not change the existing Zendesk workflow yet. Do not claim: replace support agents.

facts.pain: ticket escalations are inconsistent between tiers
facts.outcome: faster triage with clearer escalation summaries
facts.next_step: send an escalation summary example and schedule reviewer feedback
facts.constraint: do not change the existing Zendesk workflow yet

jobs.call_notes: Prospect: Sam at Harbor Clinic Team. Segment: Healthcare operations. Pain: manual appointment follow-ups create delays. Desired outcome: fewer missed callbacks with safer draft reminders. Agreed next step: send a redacted reminder draft for compliance review on Thursday 9:30 AM. Tone requested: executive. Important constraint: no patient data should be used in public examples. Do not claim: guarantee patient outcomes.

facts.pain: manual appointment follow-ups create delays
facts.outcome: fewer missed callbacks with safer draft reminders
facts.next_step: send a redacted reminder draft for compliance review
facts.constraint: no patient data should be used in public examples

jobs.call_notes: Prospect: Priya at Summit Learning Team. Segment: Education services. Pain: program coordinators rewrite similar parent updates every week. Desired outcome: a reusable draft system with human approval. Agreed next step: share three sample update drafts for review on Monday 3:00 PM. Tone requested: warm. Important constraint: do not send messages without coordinator approval. Do not claim: guarantee enrollment growth.

facts.pain: program coordinators rewrite similar parent updates every week
facts.outcome: a reusable draft system with human approval
facts.next_step: share three sample update drafts for review
facts.constraint: do not send messages without coordinator approval

jobs.call_notes: Prospect: Leo at Cedar Finance Team. Segment: Finance operations. Pain: invoice exception notes are hard to reconcile. Desired outcome: cleaner exception summaries before month-end close. Agreed next step: send the invoice exception summary format and confirm data fields on Tuesday 4:30 PM. Tone requested: technical. Important constraint: do not connect to the accounting system yet. Do not claim: eliminate audit risk.

facts.pain: invoice exception notes are hard to reconcile
facts.outcome: cleaner exception summaries before month-end close
facts.next_step: send the invoice exception summary format and confirm data fields
facts.constraint: do not connect to the accounting system yet

jobs.call_notes: Prospect: Nora at Civic Legal Ops Team. Segment: Legal operations. Pain: contract review notes are inconsistent across reviewers. Desired outcome: a safer first-pass summary with clear human review. Agreed next step: send a redacted contract summary example and validation checklist on Friday 11:00 AM. Tone requested: executive. Important constraint: do not provide legal advice or final conclusions. Do not claim: replace lawyers.

facts.pain: contract review notes are inconsistent across reviewers
facts.outcome: a safer first-pass summary with clear human review
facts.next_step: send a redacted contract summary example and validation checklist
facts.constraint: do not provide legal advice or final conclusions

jobs.call_notes: Prospect: Eli at Signal Talent Team. Segment: Recruiting operations. Pain: candidate follow-up notes are delayed after screens. Desired outcome: faster recruiter drafts with consistent next steps. Agreed next step: send a sample follow-up draft and evaluation rubric on Wednesday 4:00 PM. Tone requested: concise. Important constraint: do not rank candidates automatically. Do not claim: guarantee hiring decisions.

facts.pain: candidate follow-up notes are delayed after screens
facts.outcome: faster recruiter drafts with consistent next steps
facts.next_step: send a sample follow-up draft and evaluation rubric
facts.constraint: do not rank candidates automatically

jobs.call_notes: Prospect: Ana at Vector Product Team. Segment: Product operations. Pain: customer feedback from demos is not converted into tickets. Desired outcome: cleaner feedback summaries and next-step ownership. Agreed next step: send a sample demo recap and tag taxonomy on Thursday 1:00 PM. Tone requested: technical. Important constraint: do not create Jira tickets automatically yet. Do not claim: guarantee roadmap accuracy.

facts.pain: customer feedback from demos is not converted into tickets
facts.outcome: cleaner feedback summaries and next-step ownership
facts.next_step: send a sample demo recap and tag taxonomy
facts.constraint: do not create Jira tickets automatically yet

jobs.call_notes: Prospect: Noah at Bluebird Studio Team. Segment: Agency sales. Pain: proposal follow-ups vary by account manager. Desired outcome: more consistent next-step emails after discovery calls. Agreed next step: send a discovery-call follow-up draft and ask for brand edits on Monday 10:30 AM. Tone requested: warm. Important constraint: keep the message under 120 words. Do not claim: guarantee conversion.

facts.pain: proposal follow-ups vary by account manager
facts.outcome: more consistent next-step emails after discovery calls
facts.next_step: send a discovery-call follow-up draft and ask for brand edits
facts.constraint: keep the message under 120 words
